submissions.name: Amy
submissions.prompt: Some people think that children should begin formal education at a very early age. Others believe they should start school later. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.
submissions.essay: It is often argued that children should attend school as early as possible, while others believe a later start is more beneficial. In my opinion, although early education can help children adapt to group learning, beginning school slightly later is better for emotional development. On the one hand, starting school early allows children to build basic literacy and social skills sooner. On the other hand, not all children are mentally prepared for formal education at a young age. In conclusion, both views have merit, but I believe children should start formal education a little later.
